message:
test(proptest): add Custom status variant merge tests (beads_rust-jvkc)

5 new property tests covering Custom status merge paths:
- both sides different Custom → Conflict(BothModified) under Manual
- both sides same Custom → convergent Keep (no conflict)
- PreferNewer with different Custom statuses → keeps newer side
- one-sided Custom change → no conflict
- determinism with Custom status generators

Total: 20 merge property tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
